text: Urgent Notice: Aapka bijli bill unpaid hai. Agar payment nahi hui toh aapki power off kar di jayegi tonight. Hamare officer aapko call karenge, lekin bijli kat hone se pehle is number par call karein: 91XXXXXXXXXX ya visit karein: bijli-seva.org/pay

Aakhri chetawani: Aapka bijli bill unpaid hai. Tonight aapki power off kar di jayegi. Hamare officer aapko call karenge, lekin tab tak bijli kat jayegi. Abhi is number par call karein: 91XXXXXXXXXX ya is link par payment karein: urgent-bijli.com/paynow

Warning! Aapka bijli connection ka bill unpaid hai. Aaj raat power off ho jayegi. Hamare officer call karne wale hain, lekin bijli kat hone se rokne ke liye, 91XXXXXXXXXX par call karein ya is link par jayein: your-power.co/due

Sir/Madam, aapka bijli bill unpaid hai. Tonight 10 PM tak aapki power off kar di jayegi. Aapko ek officer ka call aayega, par bijli katne se pehle 91XXXXXXXXXX par sampark karein ya is website par visit karein: electric-alerts.net/payment

Apke ghar ki bijli aaj raat kat jayegi! Aapka bill unpaid hai. Jaldi payment karein warna power off ho jayegi tonight. Officer call kar raha hai, 91XXXXXXXXXX par call karein ya link par jayein: bijli-cut-off.com/pay

Last chance! Aapka bijli bill unpaid hai. Tonight aapki power off hone wali hai. Hamare officer aapko call karenge, lekin agar bijli kat gayi toh mushkil hogi. Turant 91XXXXXXXXXX par call karein ya link check karein: secure-bijli.biz/paybill

Emergency! Aapka electricity bill unpaid hai. Tonight aapki bijli power off ho jayegi. Ek officer aapko call kar sakta hai, par bijli katne se bachne ke liye 91XXXXXXXXXX par abhi call karein ya is link par jayein: power-shutdown.in/pay

Aapka bijli bill pending hai aur unpaid hai. Tonight aapki power off kar di jayegi. Ek officer aapko call karega, lekin bijli kat hone se pehle, 91XXXXXXXXXX par sampark karein ya is link par click karein: current-bill-pay.co/due

Critical Alert: Aapka bijli bill unpaid hai. Tonight aapki power off ho jayegi. Hamare officer jald hi call karenge, lekin bijli kat jaye, usse pehle 91XXXXXXXXXX par call karein ya yahan payment karein: fast-bijli-pay.org/clear

Hi Maa, yeh mera naya number hai. Mera purana phone kho gaya tha. Abhi main bohot badi mushkil mein hoon, urgent Rs. 20,000 ki zaroorat hai police ke liye. Please is link pe transfer kar do jaldi: policetransfer.link/help

Beta, main hoon. Mera phone kho gaya hai, ab is naye number se text kar raha hoon. Bijli ka bill urgent hai, abhi kat jayegi light. Rs. 7,000 turant pay kar do is link pe: bijlibill.co/paynow. Jaldi karna!

Papa, main hoon. Mera naya number hai. Ek accident ho gaya hai, police station mein hoon. Bail ke liye Rs. 50,000 urgent chahiye. Turant transfer karo is number pe: 8877665544. Koi call mat karna, bahar aana mushkil ho jayega.
